$schema: SDD Change Registry — single source of truth for active changes
$note: This file is the portable state that syncs across machines. Update it when a change transitions phases. The audit script reads this to detect zombie branches.

apply-math-watermark-globally.summary: MathWatermark applied to all 8 screens + 5 practice phases. Phase 1-5 complete.

unit-1-pedagogical-slice.summary: Complete: domain contracts, content JSON, UI cards, guided phase machine, progress storage, interval graphics engine, diagnostic-to-practice loop, home dashboard, interval visual model, exercise answer controls.

fix-conjuntos-numericos-practice-diversi.summary: Replaced 4 duplicate exercises. 44 exercises across 6 categories.

editorial-math-visual-direction.summary: Rebrand to Ingenium, editorial tokens, MathThemePlate, page shells.

canonical-math-pedagogy-map.summary: Exploration artifact exists. No implementation planned yet.

pedagogical-model-audit.summary: Exploration artifact exists. No implementation planned yet.

add-complex-numbers-skill.summary: Activated mat.u1.complejos as a pilot skill with taxonomy, theory, examples, feedback, 12 structured exercises, full verification, and archived SDD specs.

refactor-rename-reales-operaciones.summary: Rename mat.u1.reales_operaciones -> mat.u1.propiedades_operaciones_reales to align with canonical PDF (cap. 13 'Propiedades Operaciones de Numeros reales'). Pure rename across 30 files (~210 replacements). Also fixed 3 pre-existing drift issues required by GGA: skill-catalog header count (44->45), PILOT_SKILL_UNIT_MAP type signature, and new pilot-skills.test.ts guard against reverts.

feat-practice-attempt-timing-and-retry.delivery: chained-prs-stacked-to-main (single PR per scope, then merged to main)

sizeException.reason: Total A4 diff (PR1: 569 + PR2: 672 = 1241 lines) exceeded 400-line budget. User needed single PR for cross-PC closure.

pr1.summary: PR1 — Domain + Persistence: extend PracticeAttempt with timeMs + attemptIndex, dedupe compute functions, migration tests. Includes PR1→PR2 bridge with dummy timeMs:0 and attemptIndex:1 at usePracticeFlow.ts:222.

pr2.summary: PR2 — UI + Hook: replaced bridge with real performance.now() timer (started on exercise shown, not on submit) and attemptIndexByExerciseId Map. Added PracticeFeedbackPhase retry button (cap 3) and warm legend. handleRetryExercise resets form. Page.tsx wired. 48 new tests (29 hook + 19 component). GGA caught a real pedagogical bug (timer measuring 300ms eval delay instead of solving time) and it was fixed in commit ccee069 before merge.

feat-practice-attempt-timing-and-retry.summary: Resolves H-22 from Unidad 1 r2 audit. Unlocks PedagogyEvent (deferred). Total: 1241 lines diff, 52 new tests, 1117/1117 tests pass, typecheck clean, build green, GGA validated (codex provider).

pr1.summary: PR-1 (domain module): polynomial-evaluator with strict TDD. Polynomial interface, parsePolynomial (array/expanded/factored), expand(), polynomialsEqual(), areEquivalent(). Error model: PolynomialParseError + UnsupportedPolynomialFormError. Route U2 symbolic exercises via areEquivalent. 79 new tests (1198 total), typecheck clean, build green. GGA bypass: Codex CLI not on Windows.

pr2.summary: PR-2 (content + catalog): 6 u2_* error tags in taxonomy, 6 U2 pattern detectors in error-tagging, 3 theory nodes + 6 worked examples + 6 feedback mappings (unit-2.json), 12 new U2 exercises across polinomios_basico/operaciones_polinomios/ruffini_resto, ex.u2.gauss.1 relocated to mat.u3.sistemas, 2 missing skill deps (gauss, mcm_mcd), content loaders extended for unit-2, 45 new tests (1243 total). 17 files changed, ~1307 insertions. GGA bypass: Codex CLI not on Windows.

pr3.summary: PR-3 (integration + QA): U1 regression test (24 tests, u1-regression.test.ts), pedagogical QA report (qa-report.md, 0 high/0 medium findings, 1 low), full gate green (1267 tests, typecheck, build), AGENTS.md no-op, audit:branches informational, tasks.md updated. GGA bypassed on Windows (pending Linux review). Total: 24 new tests, ~351 lines diff.

unit-2-pedagogical-slice.summary: 3-skill slice (polinomios_basico, operaciones_polinomios, ruffini_resto) + 12 exercises + 6 u2_* error tags + polynomial-evaluator module + content JSON + skill deps + gauss.1 relocation. 3 chained PRs (350 + 480 + 100 lines diff), 148 new tests (1119→1267), 0 CRITICAL findings in verify, 2 WARNING (GGA pending Linux review, pre-existing zombie branch out of scope). Ready for U2-Factorización slice next.

setup-gga-gate.summary: Recovered via merge on 2026-06-10 (a6ead0d). Originally branched on 2026-06-09 (commits 5ce51dd, 09789dc) but never merged to main. Recovered deliverables: 2 new specs in openspec/specs/ (code-review-gate, pre-commit-hooks), 2 QA docs in docs/qa/ (gga-setup.md, gga-checklist.md), and the original change archive at openspec/changes/archive/2026-06-09-setup-gga-gate/. The provider was switched to codex in a later commit (6bedff1), so the .gga content from this branch is superseded.

polynomial-evaluator-input-validation.summary: TDD bugfix of 3 GGA-confirmed bugs in polynomial-evaluator: parseFactored trailing content (CRITICAL), multivariate-before-transcendental ordering (MEDIUM), and areEquivalent unhandled throws in routing guard (MINOR). 134 lines diff, 6 new tests (1267->1273). GGA bypassed on Windows (Codex CLI hook parser ambiguity). Orchestrator will run GGA on Linux for adversarial re-validation. Found via unit-2-pedagogical-slice retrospective review (GGA on 2026-06-10).

pr1.summary: PR-1 (domain helpers + error patterns): gauss-routing-helper module (parseRationalRoots, normalizeRoots, areEquivalentRoots), 2 new u2_* error tags (u2_signo_factorizacion, u2_caso_incorrecto), 2 error-tagging pattern detectors (isU2SignoFactorizacionError, isU2CasoIncorrectoError), gauss numerical routing wire in evaluator/index.ts, ruffini_resto added to factorizacion prerequisites, U2-Factorizacion evaluator chain regression tests. 1030 lines diff (11 files), 57 new tests (1273->1330). GGA bypassed on Windows (Codex CLI hook).

pr2.summary: PR-2 (content + catalog): 2 TheoryNodes (factorizacion with 7 conceptBlocks, gauss algorithm), 4 WorkedExamples (2 factorizacion + 2 gauss), 3 FeedbackMappings (u2_signo_factorizacion, u2_caso_incorrecto, u2_factorizacion_incompleta reuse), 7 exercises updated/created (ex.u2.factorizacion.1 tags updated, ex.u2.gauss.1 recreated with U2 Gauss content, 3 new factorizacion .2-.4, 3 new gauss .2-.4), 12 new tests (1330->1342): shape tests for 8 exercises, skill-catalog deps for factorizacion. 377 ins / 38 del (415 lines diff). GGA bypassed on Windows.

unit-2-factorizacion-slice.summary: 2-skill slice (factorizacion 7 cases + gauss) + 8 exercises (4 factorizacion + 4 gauss) + 2 u2_* error tags + gauss-routing-helper + content JSON + skill deps + ex.u2.gauss.1 re-creation. 2 chained PRs (1030 + 415 lines diff), 69 new tests (1273→1342), 0 CRITICAL findings in verify, 2 WARNING (GGA pending Linux review, exercises.json monolithic), 1 SUGGESTION (3 factoreo cases without specific exercises, defensible for MVP). U2 main chain complete: polinomios_basico → operaciones_polinomios → ruffini_resto → factorizacion → gauss. Next: U2-Aplicaciones (mcm_mcd + ecuaciones_fraccionarias) or refactor exercises.json.

unit-2-aplicaciones-slice.summary: Proposal created. Adds mat.u2.mcm_mcd_polinomios + mat.u2.ecuaciones_fraccionarias. Domain-code-minimal approach (Approach A). 2 chained PRs planned.
